title: Oil gains as supply disruptions mount
section_path: Oil gains as supply disruptions mount
section_path_text: Oil gains as supply disruptions mount
summary:
Main
Robust economic data in the US boosted sentiment. Supply side issues across energy markets remained supportive. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-08-30 120439.png | assets/2024-08-30_oil-gains-as-supply-disruptions-mount_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_e019c2801d97.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices rallied as robust US economic data eased concerns about weaker demand.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Robust economic data in the US boosted sentiment. Supply side issues across energy markets remained supportive.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices rallied as robust US economic data eased concerns about weaker demand. GDP grew at a 3% annualised rate in Q2, up from the previous estimate of 2.8%.
